reason: Verify all 5 requirements implemented: runtime node exposure, cross-node delegation with A2A, load balancing with failover, TLS/auth security, mDNS + manual discovery with status panel
Code quality: no hardcoded values, TypeBox schemas for all tool params, const-object enums, proper TypeScript strict mode
Verify error handling for node unreachable, health check timeout, TLS failure, mDNS unavailable, load balancer no-available-nodes
Frontend quality: CSS variable tokens for node status panel, glass effects, dark theme, IPC via preload bridge only
Component quality: functional components, named exports, form validation for manual node URL input, loading/error states for discovery
Type safety: RuntimeNode and related types in src/shared/types.ts, discriminated unions for node status, no any types
